# Security Policy

Kith stores personal — and optionally encrypted confidential — data, so
security reports are taken seriously.

## Supported versions

Only the latest release receives security fixes.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| latest (1.9.x) | ✅ |
| older | ❌ |

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Report privately via
[GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/jaredguiles/kith/security/advisories/new)
("Report a vulnerability" on the Security tab).

Please include:

- A description of the issue and its impact
- Steps to reproduce or a proof of concept
- The version/commit you tested against

You can expect an acknowledgement within a few days. Once a fix is released,
the advisory will be published with credit (unless you prefer otherwise).

## Security model

A summary of Kith's security architecture (auth boundary, confidential-layer
encryption, media access control) is documented in
[the security docs](https://agtechlab.dev/kith/docs/security/).
